input.prompt:
I have a new C# MCP server project. I need to implement a tool class that
wraps a REST API using HttpClient. The tools should follow MCP SDK conventions
with proper attributes for LLM discovery. Show me the tool class, Program.cs
with stdio transport, and explain how DI works for MCP tools.

data.content:

wraps a REST API using HttpClient. The tools should follow MCP SDK conventions
with proper attributes for LLM discovery. Show me the tool class, Program.cs
with stdio transport, and explain how DI works for MCP tools.

I have a new C# MCP server project. I need to implement a tool class that

with stdio transport, and explain how DI works for MCP tools.

input.initialPrompt:
I have a new C# MCP server project. I need to implement a tool class that
wraps a REST API using HttpClient. The tools should follow MCP SDK conventions
with proper attributes for LLM discovery. Show me the tool class, Program.cs
with stdio transport, and explain how DI works for MCP tools.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command: dotnet new console -n McpServer -o McpServer && cd McpServer && dotnet add package ModelContextProtocol --prerelease && dotnet add package Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection && dotnet add package Microsoft.Extensions.Http
arguments.description: Create project and add MCP SDK packages

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Create project and add MCP SDK packages

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to create a C# MCP (Model Context Protocol) server project with:
1. A tool class wrapping a REST API using HttpClient
2. Program.cs with stdio transport
3. An explanation of how DI works for MCP tools

Let me create this from scratch. I'll use the official `ModelContextProtocol` NuGet package (the C# MCP SDK). Let me set up the project.

arguments.command: dotnet new console -n McpServer -o McpServer && cd McpServer && dotnet add package ModelContextProtocol --prerelease && dotnet add package Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection && dotnet add package Microsoft.Extensions.Http
arguments.description: Create project and add MCP SDK packages

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "dotnet new console -n McpServer -o McpServer && cd McpServer && dotnet add package ModelContextProtocol --prerelease && dotnet add package Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection && dotnet add package Microsoft.Extensions.Http", "description": "Create project and add MCP SDK packages", "initial_wait": 30}
